about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Transforming market research with the power of artificial intelligence
about.missionText1: At SimuTarget.ai, we believe that every business deserves access to high-quality market research without the traditional barriers of cost, time, and complexity. Our mission is to democratize campaign testing by making it accessible to businesses of all sizes.
about.missionText2: We leverage advanced AI technology to create realistic synthetic consumer personas that provide actionable insights in minutes rather than weeks, at a fraction of the cost of traditional focus groups.
about.whatWeDoText1: SimuTarget.ai is an AI-powered synthetic market research platform that enables businesses to test their marketing campaigns, product descriptions, and advertising copy against over 1 million AI-generated consumer personas before launching.
about.whatWeDoText2: Our platform covers 4 major global regions (Turkey, USA, Europe, MENA) with culturally-aware personas that reflect real demographic distributions, consumer behaviors, and purchasing psychology specific to each market.
about.value_accuracy_desc: Our personas are built on real demographic data and validated consumer psychology models.
about.value_privacy_desc: Zero real consumer data used. Our synthetic personas eliminate all privacy and compliance risks.
about.value_global_desc: Test across multiple regions with culturally-aware personas tailored to each market.
about.value_speed_desc: Get campaign feedback in minutes, not weeks. Make faster, data-driven decisions.
about.value_accessibility_desc: From startups to enterprises, our flexible plans make market research accessible to all.
about.value_innovation_desc: We constantly improve our AI models and expand our persona databases.
about.companyText: SimuTarget Inc. is incorporated in Delaware, USA. Our development and research operations are based in Turkey, combining global business standards with cutting-edge AI research capabilities.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about SimuTarget.ai
faq.general_a1: SimuTarget.ai is an AI-powered synthetic market research platform that allows you to test marketing campaigns, ad copy, and product descriptions against AI-generated consumer personas. You get instant feedback on how real consumers would likely respond to your campaigns, without the cost and time of traditional focus groups.
faq.general_q2: How accurate are the AI personas?
faq.general_a2: Our personas are built on real demographic data, validated consumer psychology models (Big Five personality traits), and region-specific behavioral patterns. Each persona has 34+ attributes including age, income, education, buying style, and cultural anxieties. While synthetic, they provide statistically meaningful insights that correlate with real-world consumer behavior.
faq.general_a3: We currently support 4 major regions: Turkey, USA, Europe, and MENA (Middle East & North Africa). Each region has culturally-aware personas with localized names, cities, income levels, and consumer psychology profiles. We plan to expand to more regions in the future.
faq.general_q4: Is my data safe and private?
faq.general_a4: Absolutely. Since we use synthetic AI personas instead of real consumer data, there are zero privacy or GDPR/KVKK compliance risks. Your campaign content is processed securely and never shared with third parties.
faq.pricing_q1: How does the credit system work?
faq.pricing_a1: Each plan comes with a set number of monthly credits. A single campaign test costs 1 credit per persona, an A/B comparison costs 2 credits per persona (testing against 2 options), and a multi-compare costs credits per persona multiplied by the number of options. Credits reset monthly with your subscription.
faq.pricing_q2: Can I try SimuTarget for free?
faq.pricing_a2: Yes! We offer a Disposable plan at $4.99 per test that requires no subscription. This lets you try the platform with a single campaign test before committing to a monthly plan. We also offer a Starter plan at $49.99/month for those getting started.
faq.pricing_q3: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.pricing_a3: Yes, you can change your plan at any time from your Profile page. When upgrading, you'll get immediate access to new features and additional credits. When downgrading, the change takes effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
faq.pricing_a4: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all subscription plans. If you're not satisfied, contact our support team and we'll process your refund. Please see our Refund Policy for full details.
faq.technical_q1: How many personas can I test against?
faq.technical_a1: The number of personas per test is 25 by default. On higher plans, you can adjust this number. Each persona provides an individual purchase decision, confidence score, and reasoning, giving you detailed segment-level insights.
faq.technical_q2: What types of tests can I run?
faq.technical_a2: We offer three test types: Single Campaign Test (test one campaign), A/B Comparison (compare two variants head-to-head), and Multi-Compare (compare 3-4 variants simultaneously). Available test types depend on your subscription plan.
faq.technical_q3: Can I filter personas by demographics?
faq.technical_a3: Yes! Depending on your plan, you can filter by gender, age range, income level, education, buying style, marital status, tech adoption level, shopping frequency, and financial behavior. More filters are available on higher-tier plans.
faq.technical_a4: API access is available on our Enterprise plan. It allows you to integrate SimuTarget's testing capabilities directly into your existing marketing tools and workflows. Contact us for API documentation and integration support.
faq.account_q1: How do I create an account?
faq.account_a1: Click 'Get Started' on our homepage and fill in your details. You can also sign up using Google OAuth for a faster registration experience. Once registered, you can choose a plan and start testing immediately.
faq.account_q2: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.account_a2: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your Profile page. After cancellation, you'll retain access to your current plan features until the end of your billing period. Your campaign history and results will remain accessible.
faq.account_q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.account_a3: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express) through our secure payment processor Stripe. All transactions are encrypted and PCI-DSS compliant.
faq.account_a4: Yes, you can request account deletion by contacting our support team at contact@simutarget.ai. We'll process your request and permanently delete all your data within 30 days, in compliance with applicable data protection regulations.
faq.stillHaveQuestionsDesc: Our support team is here to help you with anything you need.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.acceptance_text: By accessing or using SimuTarget.ai (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our Service. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service.
terms.description_text: SimuTarget.ai is an AI-powered synthetic market research platform that generates synthetic consumer personas to test and evaluate marketing campaigns. The Service uses artificial intelligence to simulate consumer responses and does not involve real consumer data or personal information.
terms.description_text2: The results provided by our Service are predictions based on AI models and should be used as one of many data points in your marketing decision-making process. We do not guarantee specific campaign outcomes based on our predictions.
terms.accounts_text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account and keep your information up to date.
terms.accounts_text2: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.subscription_text: Some features of the Service require a paid subscription. By subscribing, you agree to pay the applicable fees as described in our pricing page. Subscriptions are billed on a recurring basis (monthly or annually) unless cancelled.
terms.subscription_text2: We reserve the right to change our pricing at any time. Price changes will be communicated in advance and will take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
terms.usage_text: You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You may not use the Service to generate content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, defamatory, or otherwise objectionable. You may not attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or disassemble the Service.
terms.usage_text2: You may not use the Service to compete directly with SimuTarget.ai or to build a similar product. Automated scraping or bulk data extraction is strictly prohibited.
terms.intellectual_text: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by SimuTarget Inc. and are protected by international copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property laws.
terms.intellectual_text2: Campaign results generated through the Service are owned by the user who created them. However, we reserve the right to use anonymized, aggregated data to improve our AI models and services.
terms.limitation_text: To the maximum extent permitted by law, SimuTarget Inc. shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses resulting from your use of or inability to use the Service.
terms.termination_text: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to the Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including breach of these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease.
terms.modifications_text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of significant changes by posting the updated Terms on our website and updating the "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.governing_text: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terms.contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at contact@simutarget.ai.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_text: SimuTarget Inc. ("we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our AI-powered synthetic market research platform.
privacy.collection_text: We collect information you provide directly, including: account registration details (name, email address), payment information (processed securely via Stripe), campaign content you submit for testing, and any communications you send to us.
privacy.collection_text2: We also automatically collect certain technical information such as IP address, browser type, device information, and usage patterns through cookies and similar technologies.
privacy.usage_text: We use your information to: provide and maintain our Service, process your transactions, send you service-related communications, improve our AI models using anonymized and aggregated data, analyze usage trends to enhance user experience, and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.cookies_text: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience. For detailed information about our cookie practices, please see our Cookie Policy.
privacy.thirdParty_text: We may share your information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our platform, including: Stripe (payment processing), OpenAI (AI inference processing — only anonymized campaign content is shared), and cloud hosting providers. These providers are contractually obligated to protect your information.
privacy.security_text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information. This includes encryption of data in transit and at rest, regular security assessments, and access controls. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy.retention_text: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. You can request deletion of your account and data at any time by contacting us at contact@simutarget.ai.
privacy.rights_text: Depending on your location, you may have rights regarding your personal information, including the right to access, correct, delete, or export your data. To exercise these rights, please contact us at contact@simutarget.ai.
privacy.rights_text2: For users in the EU/EEA, we comply with GDPR requirements. For users in Turkey, we comply with KVKK (Personal Data Protection Law) requirements.
privacy.children_text: Our Service is not directed to individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you become aware that a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at contact@simutarget.ai.

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.intro_text: This Cookie Policy explains how SimuTarget Inc. uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our website and use our services.
cookie.what_text: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the website remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience. Cookies can be "session" cookies (deleted when you close your browser) or "persistent" cookies (remain until they expire or you delete them).
cookie.types_text: Essential Cookies: Required for the basic functionality of our platform, including authentication and security. These cannot be disabled. Performance Cookies: Help us understand how visitors interact with our platform by collecting anonymous usage data. Functional Cookies: Remember your preferences such as language selection and display settings. Analytics Cookies: Used to analyze platform usage and improve our services.
cookie.howWeUse_text: We use cookies to: keep you signed in to your account, remember your language preference (Turkish/English), analyze how you use our platform to improve it, and ensure the security of your account and transactions.
cookie.thirdParty_text: Some cookies are placed by third-party services that appear on our pages. We use Google Analytics to understand usage patterns and Stripe for secure payment processing. These third parties have their own privacy and cookie policies.
cookie.manage_text: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies. However, please note that blocking essential cookies may affect the functionality of our platform.
cookie.manage_text2: You can also manage your cookie preferences through our cookie consent banner that appears when you first visit our site.
cookie.changes_text: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
cookie.contact_text: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at contact@simutarget.ai.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.guaranteeDesc: We stand behind our product. If you're not satisfied, we'll make it right.
refund.overview_text: At SimuTarget.ai, customer satisfaction is our top priority. We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all subscription plans. If you're not satisfied with our service within the first 30 days of your subscription, you can request a full refund.
refund.eligible_text: Refunds are granted in the following circumstances: if the platform experiences a technical malfunction that prevents you from using the service and cannot be resolved within a reasonable timeframe; if there is a significant discrepancy between the advertised features and the actual service provided; or if you request a refund within 30 days of your initial subscription purchase.
refund.notEligible_text: Refunds may not be granted if: you have substantially used the credits included in your plan; you purchased during a promotional period with special pricing; you have repeatedly purchased and requested refunds; or you request a refund after 30 days from the purchase date. Disposable (single-use) plans are non-refundable once the test has been executed.
refund.process_text: To request a refund, please contact our support team at contact@simutarget.ai with your account email, order reference, and reason for the refund. Please include as much detail as possible to help us process your request quickly.
refund.timeline_text: We aim to process refund requests within 1-2 business days. Once approved, the refund will be credited to your original payment method within 5-10 business days, depending on your bank or card issuer.
refund.contact_text: For any questions about our refund policy or to submit a refund request, please contact us at contact@simutarget.ai. Our support team is available Monday through Friday, 9AM to 6PM (EST).
refund.needHelp: Need help with a refund or have questions?
